sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 94:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 94:1
items.html: There are three points of Sium: The point of Tabur ends the KHB; the point of Yesod ends on ZA; the points of Sium Raglayim are the force of Sium of Malchut. (Inner Observation, Item 4)
